title: メジロ家の歩み・二帖の盾

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Finally, someone to achieve the Tenno Sweep has
appeared.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A Mejiro who has secured two glorious victories in
the same year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: McQueen! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I won two plaques for the Mejiros... In the past, I
was nothing but a burden, but now look at what
I've managed.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This is quite the accomplishment, Bright.
However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You deserve praise from someone more than
myself. What you've accomplished has surpassed
my own achievements.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What?! Eighteenth?! But I came in first!

text_block_list.name: Racing Steward
text_block_list.text:
Course obstruction. You prevented other
Umamusume from advancing.

text_block_list.name: Racing Steward
text_block_list.text:
At the turn right after the start, do you recall how
deeply you cut in toward the inside?

text_block_list.name: Racing Steward
text_block_list.text:
I'm certain obstruction was not your intention,
but our decision stands.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gasp?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But I need to win the 2,000-meter race at Tokyo.
No... I can't lose...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That was my first autumn Tenno Sho. I was so
eager to prove that I could win, I lost control of
myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This goes to show you are more skilled than I.
Where I failed, you succeeded.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: More... skilled...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: No, McQueen. I'm afraid you're mistaken.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: It's just a matter of who ran this race first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Who ran first?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes, exactly. I watched your race with my own
eyes, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I inherited that experience and your frustration,
as well as your precious desire to bring glory to
the family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's why this Tenno Sweep is not my victory
alone, but an accomplishment for all Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
This is something we accomplished together, us
Mejiros from each generation. That means you
and I as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Bright... You...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I see. That's certainly one way of looking at
it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Your spectacular way of observing things has
encouraged me. That's another one of your skills.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Bright. Thank you for
brightening that dark moment of my past.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright may just be one Umamusume, but
she's also an inheritor of history. And she made
use of that history to accomplish something
incredible today.
